points: Inbound missed while you are heads-down on delivery

factors.name: Get found
factors.line: Show up when a buyer searches for what you do.

factors.name: Fast response
factors.line: The first to respond wins most competitive deals.

scenario.company: a 6-person shop in a mid-size metro
before: Misses a large share of inbound during peak season
Sends one quote, never follows up

applied.does: works every sent quote on a day 2 / 6 / 12 cadence
drafts a review request after each completed job

after: Recovers a few quotes a month it used to lose to silence
A review count that keeps climbing
scenario.numbersNote: Illustrative, based on a $1,200 average job value. Not a guaranteed result.

moves: Follow up on 3 quotes worth $18,400 before they go cold
Request reviews from 2 finished jobs this week
Publish this week's post: 5 quick checks buyers ask about
demo.review: Hi Dana, thanks for trusting us with the job. If you have 30 seconds, a quick review really helps a small local team like ours. Here is the link.

proof.headline: Who built this
proof.who: REPLACE with the founder proof from company.yml owner, past-framed and true. No fabricated testimonials, counts, or results.
proof.guarantee: REPLACE with your real guarantee terms, or remove this key if you do not offer one.
